messages.translation: Suivez le lien pour vous connecter : {String}

messages.id: The requested project could not be found.
messages.message: The requested project could not be found.

messages.id: You do not have permission to delete this project.
messages.message: You do not have permission to delete this project.
messages.translation: Vous n’avez pas la permission de supprimer ce projet.

messages.id: You do not have permission to access this project.
messages.message: You do not have permission to access this project.
messages.translation: Vous n’avez pas la permission d’accéder à ce projet.

messages.id: The requested topic could not be found.
messages.message: The requested topic could not be found.

messages.id: You do not have permission to access this topic.
messages.message: You do not have permission to access this topic.
messages.translation: Vous n’avez pas la permission d’accéder à ce sujet.

messages.id: You do not have permission to edit this topic.
messages.message: You do not have permission to edit this topic.
messages.translation: Vous n’avez pas la permission de modifier ce sujet.

messages.id: The requested parent topic could not be found.
messages.message: The requested parent topic could not be found.
messages.translation: Le sujet parent demandé est introuvable.

messages.id: You do not have permission to create topics here.
messages.message: You do not have permission to create topics here.
messages.translation: Vous n’avez pas la permission de créer des sujets ici.

messages.id: The project for this topic could not be found.
messages.message: The project for this topic could not be found.
messages.translation: Le projet associé à ce sujet est introuvable.

messages.id: The destination topic could not be found.
messages.message: The destination topic could not be found.
messages.translation: Le sujet de destination est introuvable.

messages.id: You do not have permission to move topics in this area.
messages.message: You do not have permission to move topics in this area.
messages.translation: Vous n’avez pas la permission de déplacer des sujets dans cette zone.

messages.id: The destination parent topic could not be found.
messages.message: The destination parent topic could not be found.
messages.translation: Le sujet parent de destination est introuvable.

messages.id: Cannot move topics because it would create a cycle.
messages.message: Cannot move topics because it would create a cycle.
messages.translation: Impossible de déplacer les sujets, car cela créerait un cycle.

messages.id: One or more selected topics could not be found.
messages.message: One or more selected topics could not be found.
messages.translation: Un ou plusieurs sujets sélectionnés sont introuvables.

messages.id: You do not have permission to move one or more selected topics.
messages.message: You do not have permission to move one or more selected topics.
messages.translation: Vous n’avez pas la permission de déplacer un ou plusieurs sujets sélectionnés.

messages.id: You do not have permission to delete this topic.
messages.message: You do not have permission to delete this topic.
messages.translation: Vous n’avez pas la permission de supprimer ce sujet.

messages.id:
Welcome to your new productivity sidekick!
We’re here to help you get more done, without all the unnecessary fluff.
Keep it simple, stay organized, and let’s crush those to-do lists together.
Let’s make productivity less of a hassle and more of a habit!
messages.message:
Welcome to your new productivity sidekick!
We’re here to help you get more done, without all the unnecessary fluff.
Keep it simple, stay organized, and let’s crush those to-do lists together.
Let’s make productivity less of a hassle and more of a habit!
messages.translation:
Bienvenue à votre nouveau compagnon de productivité !
Nous sommes là pour vous aider à en faire plus, sans tout le superflu inutile.
Restez simple, restez organisé, et ensemble, écrasons ces listes de tâches.
Faisons de la productivité moins une corvée et plus une habitude !

messages.id: Just enter your email, and we’ll send you a magic link to sign in securely. No need to remember complicated passwords or create an account. This method is fast, safe, and respects your privacy—we only use your email to send the login link. Check your inbox, click the link, and you’re in. That’s it!
messages.message: Just enter your email, and we’ll send you a magic link to sign in securely. No need to remember complicated passwords or create an account. This method is fast, safe, and respects your privacy—we only use your email to send the login link. Check your inbox, click the link, and you’re in. That’s it!
messages.translation: Il vous suffit d’entrer votre adresse e-mail, et nous vous enverrons un lien magique pour vous connecter en toute sécurité. Pas besoin de retenir des mots de passe compliqués ni de créer un compte. Cette méthode est rapide, sûre et respecte votre vie privée — nous utilisons uniquement votre e-mail pour envoyer le lien de connexion. Consultez votre boîte de réception, cliquez sur le lien, et vous êtes connecté. C’est tout !

messages.id: Sent! Check your email for the magic link.
messages.message: Sent! Check your email for the magic link.
messages.translation: Envoyé ! Vérifiez votre e-mail pour le lien magique.

messages.id: The name should be less than {ProjectNameMaxLength} characters
messages.message: The name should be less than {ProjectNameMaxLength} characters
messages.translation: Le nom doit contenir moins de {ProjectNameMaxLength} caractères

messages.id: The username should be less than {UsernameMaxLength} characters
messages.message: The username should be less than {UsernameMaxLength} characters
messages.translation: Le nom d'utilisateur doit contenir moins de {UsernameMaxLength} caractères

messages.id: The title should be less than {TopicTitleMaxLength} characters
messages.message: The title should be less than {TopicTitleMaxLength} characters
messages.translation: Le titre doit contenir moins de {TopicTitleMaxLength} caractères

messages.id: The content should be less than {ContentMaxLength} characters
messages.message: The content should be less than {ContentMaxLength} characters
messages.translation: Le contenu doit contenir moins de {ContentMaxLength} caractères

messages.id: Delete this topic and its {Descendants} descendants ?
messages.message: Delete this topic and its {Descendants} descendants ?
messages.translation: Supprimer ce sujet et ses {Descendants} descendants ?
